notes: #589 implemented: buildDecisionEnforcedFallbackPayload's write_document 'Decision lock' branch (lib/briefing/generator.ts) collapsed from 9 labeled sections to one Source line + one paragraph per the issue's drafted diff. Also fixed two production validation gaps the collapse exposed: write_document forcing-function regex required 'by <date>' adjacency (widened to match any embedded ISO date), and two buildCausalFallbackCopy consequence templates (relationship_cooling, timing_asymmetry) relied on the literal 'Consequence:' label word for the missing_pressure_or_consequence gate -- reworded to carry a real risk/blocked signal word now that the label is stripped. decision-enforced-fallback.test.ts + generator-runtime.test.ts updated for the new one-paragraph shape. lib/briefing + lib/workday-presence + lib/cron suites green (1245 tests).
